headline: 2 Reasons to Watch CDNS and 1 to Stay Cautious
summary: Cadence Design Systems trades at $347.62 per share and has stayed right on track with the overall market, gaining 13.3% over the last six months. At the same time, the S&P 500 has returned 11.6%.
